company_context: Agentforce: The AI Agent Platform | Salesforce IN Skip to content Build, deploy, and manage AI agents at scale. Agentforce is the only enterprise agentic AI solution that elevates every experience by bringing together humans, applications, AI agents, and data. Now any company can safely deploy agents that work for their customers, suppliers, and employees 24/7. Teams can manage the complete agent development lifecycle with a robust set of tools to build, test, deploy, manage, and orchestrate AI agents at scale. Let humans do what they do best, and let Agentforce do the rest. Watch demos Agentforce takes the World Economic Forum The Agentforce-powered digital concierge, embedded directly into the Forum's event app, helps attendees navigate the Annual Meeting, optimise their schedules, and make meaningful connections—simply by starting a chat. Find out more Read Customer Story Join thousands of other companies who are unleashing digital labour with Agentforce. Explore Customer Momentum What's new with Agentforce Find out more Watch the keynote Take a Tour of the Agentforce 360 Platform Click through an interactive tour of all the latest Agentforce features using relevant AI Agent use cases. Take the Tour Take a Tour of the Agentforce 360 Platform Click through an interactive tour of all the latest Agentforce features using relevant AI Agent use cases. Take the Tour Agentforce Builder The all-new Agentforce Builder unifies drafting, testing, and deployment into a single conversational workspace, collapsing the traditional build-and-test loop. Teams can start by building with AI guidance, then refine in a document-like editor with autocomplete, low-code canvas, or pro-code script view — all in one modern experience. Learn more Agentforce Script Agentforce Script brings a new way to control Agentforce to pair deterministic workflows with flexible LLM reasoning. This gives enterprises hybrid reasoning agents that are both precise and adaptable. Required business logic always runs in sequence, while LLM reasoning handles nuance, ensuring predictable outcomes with natural, conversational experiences. Learn more Agentforce Voice Agentforce Voice brings AI-powered voice capabilities to all channels, enabling fast and natural conversations across phone, web, and mobile. Customise agents to match your brand's unique voice, ensuring consistent and trusted support for your customers. Learn more Intelligent Context Intelligent Context extracts and structures information from complex, unstructured sources so agents can deliver responses that are accurate and relevant to the job to be done. This includes a new low-code pipeline for unstructured, multimodal data processing, drastically reducing configuration time. Learn more Agentforce can transform any team and workflow with AI agents. The most complete enterprise agentic platform. Agentforce is a complete, extensible, and open platform, letting you build and deploy digital labour for your customers and employees

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex from DeepData AI. I came across Agentforce and was impressed with the work you're doing with AI agents. I'd love to explore how our data processing solution can help enhance your operations.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (skeptical) Ah, another sales call. What makes you think we need your solution? We've already invested heavily in our current infrastructure.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your skepticism, but our solution has helped numerous companies like yours optimize their data processing, resulting in significant cost savings and improved efficiency. I'd love to discuss some specific challenges you're facing and see if we can address them.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (concerned about integration) I'm not sure we're ready to rip and replace our existing systems. How would your solution integrate with our current setup, and what kind of disruption can we expect?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's a great question. Our solution is designed to be modular and can integrate seamlessly with your existing infrastructure. We've worked with similar companies, and the average implementation time is around 6-8 weeks. We also provide dedicated support to ensure a smooth transition.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (objection about competitors) I've already talked to some of your competitors, and they seem to offer similar solutions. What sets DeepData AI apart, and why should we choose you over them?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: While it's true that there are other solutions out there, our unique differentiator is our proprietary AI-powered engine that can handle complex data processing tasks with unparalleled speed and accuracy. We've also had success with companies in similar industries, and I'd be happy to provide case studies and references.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (objection about authority) I'm not the sole decision-maker on this. I'd need to discuss this with our IT team and get their buy-in. Can you provide some materials or a demo that I can share with them?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely. I can provide a customized demo that addresses your specific pain points and showcases the value our solution can bring. I can also offer a trial period to let your team test our solution firsthand.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alright, let's schedule that demo for next week, and I'll make sure to invite our IT team. If it goes well, we can discuss further about implementation and pricing.

analysis.raw:
Score: 8
Outcome: Success
Key_Objection: Integration
Feedback: The seller could have provided more specific examples or case studies to address the buyer's concerns and objections more effectively. Sentiment: Neutral
